npm_view_status.summary: Package name is not currently present on the public npmjs registry from this machine.

local_publish_auth_status.required: Login with npm adduser or provide NPM_TOKEN/NODE_AUTH_TOKEN before npmjs publish.

publish_readiness.note: Size, shasum, and integrity are intentionally omitted because editing this manifest changes the dry-run tarball digest.

publish_when_auth_exists.publish_rule: Only publish from an authorized owner account. The current GitHub token cannot create an active workflow without workflow scope, so this repo ships a workflow template instead. Do not claim npmjs availability until npm view softjunk-lead-kit returns a real package record.

current_live_no_auth_routes.run_from_github_package: npm exec --yes --package github:trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit -- softjunk-lead-kit pay --mode custom --json

payment.verification_gate: This status proves package publish readiness only. Do not claim paid, started, delivered, fulfilled, complete, received, or stop unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists or PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.
